1.2: Basically, tissues are the building blocks for our organs. The tissues make the organs that keep us alive! We have different types of tissues in our body! We have over a thousand tissues.
1.6: * This is the covering and the lining of organs. It helps protect different types of organs like the skin in our body. It can either be single layered or multi layered. It is also categorized by shape.Squamous (flat), Cuboidal (cube-like), and Columnar (tall).
1.10: * This connects, binds and supports different types of organs. Organs would lose framework if they were not to exist.
1.14: * This helps us move, it produces movement for our body to create a certain action.
1.16: a. Skeletal muscles (found in bones only)
1.17: b. Cardiac muscles (found in heart only)
1.18: c. Smooth muscles (found in smooth organs like glands)
1.20: * The reason why we can communicate with other people. It sends signals to the brain.
